notes: waxed stronger and stronger, and the house of Saul waxed weaker and weaker.

quotes.text: David had only two wives when he first went to Hebron to be made king (2:2), but several additional wives and concubines are listed here.
quotes.speaker: Daniel H. Ludlow
quotes.source: A Companion to Your Study of the Old Testament
quotes.attr: Daniel H. Ludlow, A Companion to Your Study of the Old Testament, 221

notes: Ishbosheth "man of shame" surviving son of Saul, king of Israel for 7 years while David was king over Judah
